zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Choke於大約1450年出生時，她的父親Sir Richard Choke32歲，母親Joan Pavy27歲。她於1488年之前與John Biconyll結婚。她去世於1504年6月30日享年55歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特格拉斯頓波瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Choke于大约1450年出生时，她的父亲Sir Richard Choke32岁，母亲Joan Pavy27岁。她于1488年之前与John Biconyll结婚。她去世于1504年6月30日享年55岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特格拉斯頓波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Choke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): from Middle English cloke ‘cloak’ (Old French cloche, cloke), a nickname denoting an habitual or distinctive cloak wearer, or perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a cloak maker.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Choke was born about 1450, her father, Sir Richard Choke, was 32 and her mother, Joan Pavy, was 27. She married John Biconyll before 1488. She died on 30 June 1504, at the age of 55, and was buried in Glastonbury, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Choke est née environ 1450, son père, Sir Richard Choke, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Pavy, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Biconyll avant 1488. Elle est décédée le 30 juin 1504, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Glastonbury, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Choke um 1450 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Choke 32 und ihre Mutter Joan Pavy 27. Sie hat vor 1488 John Biconyll geheiratet. Sie starb am 30. Juni 1504 im Alter von 55 Jahren und wurde in Glastonbury, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Choke è nata il circa 1450, sua padre, Sir Richard Choke, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Joan Pavy, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Biconyll prima del 1488. Morì il 30 giugno 1504, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Glastonbury, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Chokeが約1450年に生まれた時，父Sir Richard Chokeは32歳，母Joan Pavyは27歳であった。1488年以前にJohn Biconyllと結婚した。彼女は1504年6月30日に55歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトグラストンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Choke(이)가 대략 1450년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Choke(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Pavy(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1488년 이전 John Biconyll(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1504년 6월 30일 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 글라스토버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Beckington, Somerset, England: Beckington with Standerwick, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Choke nasceu aproximadamente 1450, seu pai, Sir Richard Choke, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Pavy, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Biconyll antes 1488. Ela faleceu em 30 de junho de 1504, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Glastonbury, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Choke родилась около 1450 г., её отцу по имени Sir Richard Choke было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Pavy, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Biconyll перед 1488 г. Она умерла 30 июня 1504 г. в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности гластонбури, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Choke nació aproximadamente 1450, su papá, Sir Richard Choke, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Pavy, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Biconyll antes de 1488. Murió el 30 de junio de 1504, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Glastonbury, Somerset, Inglaterra.
